summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a fire‑filled second set highlighted by a superb Other One suite and a storming Big Railroad Blues.
review: The recording, sourced from Charlie Miller’s famed tape‑stock, is crystal‑clear with just a slightly high piano mix in the early tracks – a minor quirk that doesn’t detract from the overall brilliance. Musically the show shines; Jerry’s guitar stays on point all night, Phil’s bass tone is “tasty,” and Keith’s piano is both inspired and perfectly balanced, driving an unforgettable Other One suite and a powerhouse rendition of Big Railroad Blues.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give 5‑star praise, highlighting both top‑tier performance (especially the Other One suite) and an excellent soundboard recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear, balanced tape‑stock sound; piano sits a bit high in the mix on early tracks but is not problematic. No dropouts or major artifacts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows with high energy; the band is “on fire,” delivering seamless transitions and a powerful climax in the Other One suite.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Consistently good tone all night, praised for his playing on the Other One.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass tone described as ‘really tasty’ for this period.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s piano is high in the mix early but perfectly fitting—playing is inspired and never overbearing.
